title: SecZetta Delivers Strong First Quarter with Record Customer Wins and New Strategic Partnerships
text: FALL RIVER, Mass.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--SecZetta, the leading provider of third-party identity risk solutions, today shared its business growth highlights for the first quarter of its 2023 fiscal year ending in April 2022. The company delivered strong first quarter results building on the momentum coming out of 2021, underscoring its continued leadership in addressing third-party identity risk and enabling organizations to better manage the identity risk and lifecycle management needs of their grow

title: Dominion Energy makes rooftop solar easier, more affordable for Virginia residents
text: BrightSuite, a Dominion Energy company, delivers full-service rooftop solar solutions for Virginia homeowners Company simplifies the process every step of the way ensuring homeowners get the right system at the right price Dominion Energy employees meet directly with customers to provide expert guidance on the true costs and benefits of going solar RICHMOND, Va. , June 21, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Going solar can be complicated, and that's where BrightSuite can help.

title: Dominion Energy: Big Relative Strength Comes At A High Cost
text: The Utilities sector is very expensive as investors seek safety amid a highly-volatile stock market. Virginia-based Dominion Energy is a steady performer but features a very high P/E ratio with negative free cash flow.
